dialog.msg_confirm_delete_content: Are you sure you want to delete {} and related files?
dialog.msg_batch_delete_info: Tags will be filtered based on your blacklist/whitelist.
dialog.msg_no_images: No images found in this directory.

settings.setting_batch_trigger: Use folder name as trigger word
settings.setting_mask_only_bg: Batch mask only if has 'background' tag
settings.setting_mask_ocr_hint: OCR requires imgutils.ocr; skips if not installed.
settings.setting_filter_info: Content matching blacklist and NOT in whitelist will be highlighted red and can be filtered on Batch write.
settings.setting_llm_skip_nsfw: Batch LLM: Skip if tag contains rating:explicit/questionable
settings.setting_llm_use_gray_mask: LLM Use Gray Mask (exclude transparent parts)
settings.setting_ocr_heat_tip: Lower: detects faint text (more noise); Higher: strict check.
settings.setting_ocr_box_tip: Confidence threshold. Lower if text is missed.
settings.setting_ocr_unclip_tip: Expansion ratio. Increase if edges are cut; decrease if merging lines.

error.error_cuda_warning_msg:
NVIDIA GPU (CUDA) not detected.

This may be due to incorrect PyTorch version in venv.
Please run 'fix_torch_gpu.bat' in the root directory to fix.

Currently using CPU, which will be very slow.
error.error_ocr_not_available: OCR requires imgutils.ocr module; skips if not installed.

tooltip.tip_auto_tag:
Use WD14 AI model to auto-tag current image
Click tags to add to text box below
tooltip.tip_batch_tagger:
Run auto-tagging on all images in folder
Results saved in JSON, not written to txt
tooltip.tip_batch_tagger_to_txt:
Run tagging on all images and write to .txt files
Images with existing tags will use cache
tooltip.tip_add_custom_tag:
Add custom tag to current folder
These tags are saved in .custom_tags.json
tooltip.tip_run_llm:
Use AI LLM to generate natural language description
Results shown in LLM Result area above
tooltip.tip_batch_llm:
Run LLM generation on all images
Results saved in JSON, not written to txt
tooltip.tip_batch_llm_to_txt:
Run LLM on all images and write to .txt files
Images with existing LLM results will use cache
tooltip.tip_prev_nl:
View previous LLM generation result
All LLM history for each image is preserved
tooltip.tip_reset_prompt: Reset to current Prompt template content
tooltip.tip_token_count:
CLIP Token count, SD recommends not exceeding 225
Text turns red when exceeded
tooltip.tip_find_replace:
Find and replace text in current or all image txt files
(Supports regular expressions)
tooltip.tip_unmask: Use AI to remove background from current image, original is backed up
tooltip.tip_mask_text: Use OCR to detect and mask text regions in current image
tooltip.tip_restore: Restore original image from backup folder
tooltip.tip_view_mode:
Switch image preview mode
- Original: Show original image
- RGB: Force opaque color display
- Alpha: Show transparency mask (black=transparent)

Hotkeys: Hold N (RGB) / Hold M (Alpha)
